componentDescription: A customizable overlay that displays a list of choices or actions when triggered.

trigger.description: Defines the element that will trigger the dropdown menu to open or close.

items.description: An array of data representing the items to be displayed within the dropdown menu.

size.description: Specifies the visual size of the dropdown menu.

variant.description: Defines the visual style or variant of the dropdown menu.

side.description: Determines the preferred position of the dropdown content relative to its trigger (e.g., 'top', 'bottom', 'left', 'right').

align.description: Specifies the alignment of the dropdown content relative to the trigger on the specified side (e.g., 'start', 'center', 'end').

defaultOpen.description: Controls the initial open state of the dropdown menu.

views.description: Provides custom styles to be applied to different parts of the dropdown menu component.

otherProps.description: Allows for additional, arbitrary props to be passed to the component, providing flexibility for custom attributes.
